title: rumfordia standleyi
intro: Rumfordia standleyi, also known as Standley's Rumfordia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rumfordia standleyi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
